    Serialized Form

    • Package exceptions

      • Exception Class exceptions.LowHIndexException

        class LowHIndexException extends Exception implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • actualHIndex
            int actualHIndex
            The researcher's h-index at the time the exception was thrown.
          • requiredHIndex
            int requiredHIndex
            The minimum h-index that was required for the attempted operation.
          • researcherName
            String researcherName
            Full name of the researcher who failed the check.

      • Exception Class exceptions.NotResearcherException

        class NotResearcherException extends Exception implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • userId
            String userId

    • Package models

      • Class models.Admin

        class Admin extends Employee implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

      • Class models.BachelorStudent

        class BachelorStudent extends Student implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • researchSupervisorName
            String researchSupervisorName

      • Class models.Course

        class Course extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • courseId
            String courseId
            Unique identifier for this course (e.g. "COMP" or "MATH101").
          • credits
            int credits
            Number of credit hours this course is worth.
          • lessons
            List<LessonType> lessons
            Ordered list of lesson formats offered in this course (lecture, lab, etc.).
          • name
            String name
            Human-readable course name (e.g. "Computer Networks").
          • teachers
            List<String> teachers
            Usernames or display names of teachers assigned to this course.

      • Class models.Employee

        class Employee extends User implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • department
            String department
          • inbox
            List<String> inbox

      • Class models.Manager

        class Manager extends Employee implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • managerType
            ManagerType managerType

      • Class models.Mark

        class Mark extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • att1
            double att1
          • att2
            double att2
          • courseName
            String courseName
          • finalMark
            double finalMark
          • observers
            List<GradeObserver> observers
          • studentId
            String studentId

      • Class models.News

        class News extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • author
            String author
          • content
            String content
          • createdAt
            LocalDateTime createdAt
          • newsId
            String newsId
          • title
            String title

      • Class models.Student

        class Student extends User implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • major
            String major
            Academic department / discipline of the student (immutable after creation).
          • marksByCourseName
            Map<String,Mark> marksByCourseName
            Maps course name → latest Mark for that course. A LinkedHashMap preserves insertion order for transcript printing.
          • notifications
            List<String> notifications
            In-memory notification messages received via the observer mechanism.
          • ratedTeachers
            Map<String,Integer> ratedTeachers
            Maps teacher username → rating (1–5) given by this student. Each teacher can be rated at most once per student.
          • registeredCourses
            List<Course> registeredCourses
            Courses the student has been approved to attend.
          • yearOfStudy
            int yearOfStudy
            Current year of study (1-based).

      • Class models.Teacher

        class Teacher extends Employee implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • assignedCourses
            List<Course> assignedCourses
          • position
            Position position
          • ratings
            List<Integer> ratings

      • Class models.User

        class User extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • active
            boolean active
            true while the account is enabled; false when deactivated.
          • deactivationReason
            String deactivationReason
            Optional human-readable explanation set when an account is deactivated.
          • firstName
            String firstName
          • id
            String id
            Unique identifier for the user (never changes after creation).
          • lastLoginAt
            LocalDateTime lastLoginAt
            Timestamp of the most recent successful login, or null if never logged in.
          • lastName
            String lastName
          • passwordHash
            String passwordHash
            SHA-256 hex digest of the user's password. Never stored as plain text.
          • username
            String username

    • Package research

      • Class research.ConcreteResearcher

        class ConcreteResearcher extends ResearcherDecorator implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

      • Class research.ResearcherDecorator

        class ResearcherDecorator extends User implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • hIndex
            int hIndex
          • papers
            List<ResearchPaper> papers
          • projects
            List<ResearchProject> projects
          • wrappedUser
            User wrappedUser

        class ResearchPaper extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • authors
            List<String> authors
          • citations
            int citations
          • journal
            String journal
          • pages
            int pages
          • paperId
            String paperId
          • publicationDate
            LocalDate publicationDate
          • title
            String title

        class ResearchProject extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

            List<ResearchPaper> papers
          • participantIds

          • projectId

          • topic

        1L
